meaning: n.(商队,游客经过沙漠时为安全起见而结队同行的)沙漠,旅行队,大篷车
examples: There were forty camels in the caravan, and the mules were twice forty in number.
I invite them back to my caravan instead to have homemade cider around the campfire.
Her landlocked country is a desert land that was once a hub for ancient Saharan caravan routes.
Police said the thieves forced the doors of the locked caravan and opened sealed bags.
"There was even somebody trying to back a caravan up the slip road, " she said.
